name: Orbital Docking Customs
description: Use finite RCS impulses, coasting, counter-burns, and attitude control to enter a narrow physical docking envelope.
natural_language: Rendezvous with the customs port and request a gentle hard dock with matched position, speed, and attitude.

metadata.notes: New Interaction VII–VIII candidate. The browser renders the generated physical state and records only ordinary pointer/keyboard control events; the live server and exported verifier independently replay the mechanic-specific geometry or dynamics.
